title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 163.025 - Operating levy reduction below minimum rate, effect upon accreditation classification
text:
163.025.  Operating levy reduction below minimum rate, effect upon accreditation classification. — Whenever the adjusted operating levy, as defined in section 163.011, of any school district is required, pursuant to Article X, Section 22 of the Missouri Constitution, to be reduced below the minimum tax rate required for the current school year under section 163.021, the district shall not be classified as unaccredited under section 163.023.
(L. 1995 H.B. 211 § 1, A.L. 1996 S.B. 795, et al., A.L. 2005 S.B. 287) 
Effective 7-01-06
